prose: Fukui reactivity indices computed for ferrocene (21 atoms: 10 C, 10 H, 1 Fe) using GFN2-xTB (semi-empirical tight-binding) in the gas phase. Charge 0, multiplicity 1 for neutral; cation charge +1 mult 2; anion charge −1 mult 2. Mulliken partial charges scheme. All three SCF states converged; f⁺ and f⁻ each sum to 1.0000. No engine warnings. The Fe centre (atom 11) is both the most electrophilic (f⁺ = 0.22885456) and most nucleophilic (f⁻ = 0.25938191) site. Its dual descriptor is −0.030527354 (negative → net nucleophilic character). Cp C-atom Fukui values are ~0.012–0.014 with small positive dual descriptors (mild electrophilic character at the ring). Headline value reported: f⁻(Fe) = 0.25938191. Integrity: trustworthy = true. No warnings reported.
